Hey dudes, what's up? Okay, so one of the really important things that you're going to need to do is you're going to want to have a clipboard at the front desk or wherever people are walking in to make sure that they sign in before they sit down with you. Okay, now this is really important for a couple of reasons. One, because we need to know how many people came in that you saw so we can have proper closing statistics. Second reason is because we need to know what the show up rates on the appointments are so that the appointment coordinator, so we know what their statistics are in terms of the show up rates because it's not just you. I need to see how many people are showing up by percentage. And then we need to see what percentage you're closing. And then also if for some reason someone is not on this list and they were scheduled, then we know that they were a no show and then we can follow up with them. Okay, so it's really important that this gets filled out and filled out accurately. It also just helps because in the middle of the rush, in the middle of the afternoon, you're just going to be seeing bodies and you're not going to remember people's names at all, I promise you. So just make sure that they write their name, their phone number and the time that they came in. The other thing that this kind of serves as, and you're going to put this out onto a clipboard, but if someone's coming in here and they see all these appointments beforehand, they're just like, damn, they don't need me at all. And so you're already kind of giving yourself some things to work with. So they're already being positioned in their mind as, ah, crap, did you fill the spots up yet? You're like, yeah, I've seen a bunch of people today. It's been awesome. So tell me, what's your goal? You know, and then you can transition right into the sale, which we'll get to in the next video. Okay, so just make sure that they sign in. It's really important for the stats, for you and for everyone else involved. Okey-doke, thanks.
